heading: Full Stack Web Developer
paragraphs: I am a Full Stack Developer from Egypt with 4+ years of experience building robust PHP and Laravel backends for SaaS, e-commerce, and business platforms.
My work spans multi-vendor products, real-time features, payment integrations, AI-powered workflows, and internal systems such as ERP, CRM, WMS, and HRM platforms.
I build backend systems with Laravel and PHP, and deliver user-focused frontend experiences with React.js and Vue.js.
